TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_kanus, title = kanus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/kanus} }

S.FORM: kanus śĆáÁĒ≤ kakiliman kanus saan, u limaay a kanus atu kuku'ay a kanus, u atekakay a banges iayaway nu lima atu kuku'. atekakay a kanus, taneng miizaw ku sakabaekeday a kawaw, mudiput tu taludu' nu mita. taneng kami mikapet, taneneg kami misalama tu piano, usakasa izaw ku kanus kami, sisa izaw ku icelang ku taludu' nu mita. iyadahay a izang pakatukuh i kanus, sapisadimel tu izang i iluc nu lima, taneng padihku tu kidu nu mita. nilacul u kanus nu tademaw anu maikes ku kanus, sikisis, mangeli', mahiza sa, caay tu katineng midiput ku taludu'. tanaya' ku kanus paydemidemiad haymaw. mucelak kutanaya' satuba' nu kanus, cacay kungli pay cacay bataan a demiad, tulu kungli pay cacay a bulad. baluhayay a kanus mucelak nay lamit nu kanus, haymaw saan patababaw. haymaw mucelak saan ku kanus. anu caay pidiput tu kanus, patudud hen, patanaya' han kya kanus. mangasiw tanaya' ku kanus, dayum tu mangeli', mapudac. zumasatu, izaw ku ungieng labu' nu kanus. sisa, saiten ku kanus, amana patanaya tu kanus. anu mahiza sa, izaw ku ungin ilabu nu kanus. sawsawni pisaiten tu ku kanus, caay kakapah tatanaya' ku kanus. u belih nu pabaw kuku' taludu' atu lima taludu', sikanus tu i taludu' nu lima, pulung sa izaw tusa a bataan. kanahantu limaay a kanus kya kaukak mahiza tu kuku', izaw tu adidi'ay a caay kalecad. tanektekay a kanus haycantu maazih tu labu nu kanus, adidi' ku sumanahay kya kulit. lameneng i hekal nu kanus. langaw nu kanus, caay kalecad nu mihca, tanektek, puu' nu demiad... izay katanaya' ku kanus kanus atu bukes nikasumad ihekalay a si-paw , u labu' nu neni' ku tan-pay-ce . matanaya' ku bukes u ťÄĪśúüśÄßay. amahetik ku bukes, inuayaway a buhang malangaw u baluhayay a bukes. nika u kanus sa, caay kapecu', sisa, anu caay sayiten, atanaya'tu. kya ihekalay a sipaw namakalecuh katukuh mapatay, cacacacay saan malangaw atu tabaki, sisa, baluhayay a tanpayce tahkal tuway caay kahezek, sisa, amisayit tuway ku kanus. u nanam atu lalangawan mahinisa mucelak ku kanus haymawhaymaw satu, isasa' nu kanus madayum maunging, namakay madimelay , kakaydihan kita pisait tu kanus kita. katuud ku tademaw misalama' tu sadadiway , tinaku ku pianu asaca cital , saungay tu lima taludu' atu kanus, sisa, pisait tu kanus cacay a lipay. zumasa, misait tu kanus, akapisait taapuyu', amaduka ku lima. capi a mihecaan, mikulit ku tatayna i kanus, pabangcal tu kanus, yadah ku kulit ipabaw i kanus, salungan kya kanus, uzamasa, pazepit ku bangcalay paceba'ay a kanus ipabaw nu tatengaay a kanus, anu mahiza, bangcal tu ku kanus saan.
S.PHON: kanus ** kakir~…ĺiman kanus saan, u r~…ĺimaaj a kanus atu kuku Ē~ °aj a kanus, u at…ôkakaj a baŇč…ôs iajawaj nu r~…ĺima atu kuku Ē~ °. at…ôkakaj a kanus, tan…ôŇč miizaw ku sakaba…ôk…ôdaj a kawaw, mudiput tu tar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° nu mita. tan…ôŇč kami mikap…ôt, tan…ôn…ôg kami misar~…ĺama tu piano, usakasa izaw ku kanus kami, sisa izaw ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku tar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° nu mita. ijadańßaj a izaŇč pakatukuńß i kanus, sapisadim…ôr~…ĺ tu izaŇč i ir~…ĺu ¶ nu r~…ĺima, tan…ôŇč padińßku tu kidu nu mita. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u kanus nu tad…ômaw anu maik…ôs ku kanus, sikisis, maŇč…ôr~…ĺi Ē~ °, mańßiza sa, ¶aaj tu katin…ôŇč midiput ku tar~…ĺudu Ē~ °. tanaja Ē~ ° ku kanus pajd…ômid…ômiad ńßajmaw. mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak kutanaja Ē~ ° satuba Ē~ ° nu kanus, ¶a ¶aj kuŇčr~…ĺi paj ¶a ¶aj bataan a d…ômiad, tur~…ĺu kuŇčr~…ĺi paj ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad. bar~…ĺuńßajaj a kanus mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak naj r~…ĺamit nu kanus, ńßajmaw saan patababaw. ńßajmaw mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak saan ku kanus. anu ¶aaj pidiput tu kanus, patudud ńß…ôn, patanaja Ē~ ° ńßan kja kanus. maŇčasiw tanaja Ē~ ° ku kanus, dajum tu maŇč…ôr~…ĺi Ē~ °, mapuda ¶. zumasatu, izaw ku uŇči…ôŇč r~…ĺabu Ē~ ° nu kanus. sisa, sait…ôn ku kanus, amana patanaja tu kanus. anu mańßiza sa, izaw ku uŇčin ir~…ĺabu nu kanus. sawsawni pisait…ôn tu ku kanus, ¶aaj kakapańß tatanaja Ē~ ° ku kanus. u b…ôr~…ĺińß nu pabaw kuku Ē~ ° tar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° atu r~…ĺima tar~…ĺudu Ē~ °, sikanus tu i tar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺima, pur~…ĺuŇč sa izaw tusa a bataan. kanańßantu r~…ĺimaaj a kanus kja kaukak mańßiza tu kuku Ē~ °, izaw tu adidi Ē~ °aj a ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad. tan…ôkt…ôkaj a kanus ńßaj ¶antu maazińß tu r~…ĺabu nu kanus, adidi Ē~ ° ku sumanańßaj kja kur~…ĺit. r~…ĺam…ôn…ôŇč i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kanus. r~…ĺaŇčaw nu kanus, ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu mińß ¶a, tan…ôkt…ôk, puu Ē~ ° nu d…ômiad... izaj katanaja Ē~ ° ku kanus kanus atu buk…ôs nikasumad ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a si-paw , u r~…ĺabu Ē~ ° nu n…ôni Ē~ ° ku tan-paj- ¶…ô . matanaja Ē~ ° ku buk…ôs u ***aj. amańß…ôtik ku buk…ôs, inuajawaj a buńßaŇč mar~…ĺaŇčaw u bar~…ĺuńßajaj a buk…ôs. nika u kanus sa, ¶aaj kap…ô ¶u Ē~ °, sisa, anu ¶aaj sajit…ôn, atanaja Ē~ °tu. kja ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a sipaw namakar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß katukuńß mapataj, ¶a ¶a ¶a ¶aj saan mar~…ĺaŇčaw atu tabaki, sisa, bar~…ĺuńßajaj a tanpaj ¶…ô tańßkar~…ĺ tuwaj ¶aaj kańß…ôz…ôk, sisa, amisajit tuwaj ku kanus. u nanam atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan mańßinisa mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak ku kanus ńßajmawńßajmaw satu, isasa Ē~ ° nu kanus madajum mauŇčiŇč, namakaj madim…ôr~…ĺaj , kakajdińßan kita pisait tu kanus kita. katuud ku tad…ômaw misar~…ĺama Ē~ ° tu sadadiwaj , tinaku ku pianu asa ¶a ¶itar~…ĺ , sauŇčaj tu r~…ĺima tar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° atu kanus, sisa, pisait tu kanus ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺipaj. zumasa, misait tu kanus, akapisait taapuju Ē~ °, amaduka ku r~…ĺima. ¶api a mińß…ô ¶aan, mikur~…ĺit ku tatajna i kanus, pabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺ tu kanus, jadańß ku kur~…ĺit ipabaw i kanus, sar~…ĺuŇčan kja kanus, uzamasa, paz…ôpit ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj pa ¶…ôba Ē~ °aj a kanus ipabaw nu tat…ôŇčaaj a kanus, anu mańßiza, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ tu ku kanus saan.
S.FORM: kanus śĆáÁĒ≤ kakiliman kanus saan, u limaay a kanus atu kuku'ay a kanus, u atekakay a banges iayaway nu lima atu kuku'. atekakay a kanus, taneng miizaw ku sakabaekeday a kawaw, mudiput tu taludu' nu mita. taneng kami mikapet, taneneg kami misalama tu piano, usakasa izaw ku kanus kami, sisa izaw ku icelang ku taludu' nu mita. iyadahay a izang pakatukuh i kanus, sapisadimel tu izang i iluc nu lima, taneng padihku tu kidu nu mita. nilacul u kanus nu tademaw anu maikes ku kanus, sikisis, mangeli', mahiza sa, caay tu katineng midiput ku taludu'. tanaya' ku kanus paydemidemiad haymaw. mucelak kutanaya' satuba' nu kanus, cacay kungli pay cacay bataan a demiad, tulu kungli pay cacay a bulad. baluhayay a kanus mucelak nay lamit nu kanus, haymaw saan patababaw. haymaw mucelak saan ku kanus. anu caay pidiput tu kanus, patudud hen, patanaya' han kya kanus. mangasiw tanaya' ku kanus, dayum tu mangeli', mapudac. zumasatu, izaw ku ungieng labu' nu kanus. sisa, saiten ku kanus, amana kulit. lameneng i hekal nu kanus. langaw nu kanus, caay kalecad nu mihca, tanektek, puu' nu demiad... izay katanaya' ku kanus kanus atu bukes nikasumad ihekalay a si-paw , u labu' nu neni' ku tan-pay-ce . matanaya' ku bukes u ťÄĪśúüśÄßay. amahetik ku bukes, inuayaway a buhang malangaw u baluhayay a bukes. nika u kanus sa, caay kapecu', sisa, anu caay sayiten, atanaya'tu. kya ihekalay a sipaw namakalecuh katukuh mapatay, cacacacay saan malangaw atu tabaki, sisa, baluhayay a tanpayce tahkal tuway caay kahezek, sisa, amisayit tuway ku kanus. u nanam atu lalangawan mahinisa mucelak ku kanus haymawhaymaw satu, isasa' nu kanus madayum maunging, namakay madimelay , kakaydihan kita pisait tu kanus kita. katuud ku tademaw misalama' tu sadadiway , tinaku ku pianu asaca cital , saungay tu lima taludu' atu kanus, sisa, pisait tu kanus cacay a lipay. zumasa, misait tu kanus, akapisait taapuyu', amaduka ku lima. capi a mihecaan, mikulit ku tatayna i kanus, pabangcal tu kanus, yadah ku kulit ipabaw i kanus, salungan kya kanus, uzamasa, pazepit ku bangcalay paceba'ay a kanus ipabaw nu tatengaay a kanus, anu mahiza, bangcal tu ku kanus saan.

katanaja Ē~ ° ku kanus kanus atu buk…ôs nikasumad ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a si-paw , u r~…ĺabu Ē~ ° nu n…ôni Ē~ ° ku tan-paj- ¶…ô . matanaja Ē~ ° ku buk…ôs u ***aj. amańß…ôtik ku buk…ôs, inuajawaj a buńßaŇč mar~…ĺaŇčaw u bar~…ĺuńßajaj a buk…ôs. nika u kanus sa, ¶aaj kap…ô ¶u Ē~ °, sisa, anu ¶aaj sajit…ôn, atanaja Ē~ °tu. kja ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a sipaw namakar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß katukuńß mapataj, ¶a ¶a ¶a ¶aj saan mar~…ĺaŇčaw atu tabaki, sisa, bar~…ĺuńßajaj a tanpaj ¶…ô tańßkar~…ĺ tuwaj ¶aaj kańß…ôz…ôk, sisa, amisajit tuwaj ku kanus. u nanam atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan mańßinisa mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak ku kanus ńßajmawńßajmaw satu, isasa Ē~ ° nu kanus madajum mauŇčiŇč, namakaj madim…ôr~…ĺaj , kakajdińßan kita pisait tu kanus kita. katuud ku tad…ômaw misar~…ĺama Ē~ ° tu sadadiwaj , tinaku ku pianu asa ¶a ¶itar~…ĺ , sauŇčaj tu r~…ĺima tar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° atu kanus, sisa, pisait tu kanus ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺipaj. zumasa, misait tu kanus, akapisait taapuju Ē~ °, amaduka ku r~…ĺima. ¶api a mińß…ô ¶aan, mikur~…ĺit ku tatajna i kanus, pabaŇč ¶ar~…ĺ tu kanus, jadańß ku kur~…ĺit ipabaw i kanus, sar~…ĺuŇčan kja kanus, uzamasa, paz…ôpit ku baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj pa ¶…ôba Ē~ °aj a kanus ipabaw nu tat…ôŇčaaj a kanus, anu mańßiza, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ tu ku kanus saan.
